summary_en: Framework update to capital-cost and share-price conscious management originally announced 2024-07-09. Specific revised metrics and targets not disclosed in excerpt; see attachment for details.
title_en: Response to Realizing Capital-Cost and Share-Price Conscious Management (Update)
translation_en_brief: On 2026-05-27, Warabeya Nichiyo Holdings announced an update to its capital-cost and share-price conscious management framework originally disclosed on 2024-07-09. The board has reviewed and revised the content of the prior initiative. The specific revised targets, metrics, and timelines are contained in the attached materials and are not detailed in this cover announcement.
